query: heavy film grain noise analog photograph high ISO texture
message: sub:film_artifacts/grain — anti_aesthetic — heavy grain, high-ISO noise, push-processed analog texture

response.objective_caption: A black-and-white photograph showing a diagonal beam of light cutting across a dark surface, with the light entering from the upper right and illuminating a textured plane below. The illuminated area reveals subtle horizontal striations or ridges, while the upper portion remains in deep shadow. Fine grain texture is visible across the entire frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily grainy black-and-white photograph dominated by analog film noise, with extreme underexposure swallowing most of the frame in crushing darkness. A weak diagonal beam of light cuts across the image, revealing only murky, smeared texture without discernible detail on an indistinct surface below. The flat, oppressive tonal range offers minimal contrast between shadow and light, creating a suffocating atmosphere of dread and visual ambiguity where the subject dissolves into abstract darkness.
